studies.title: Investigation of language improvement in aphasia using the app “neolexon Aphasie” as a home exercise supplement

_verification.reason: The study specifically investigates the use of the app 'neolexon Aphasie' as a home exercise supplement for individuals with aphasia, explicitly naming the product in both the title and the full text. The manufacturer, Limedix GmbH, is also identified as the developer.

_classification.reason: The information provided indicates that this is a study protocol registered in a trial registry, with no results or specific design details such as randomization or observational methods described. Therefore, it is classified as INELIGIBLE.
